fileComments: PdfMinty Automated Cleaning System configuration rules
// ignorePatterns: Directories or paths excluded entirely from parsing
// deadCodeThreshold: Minimum confidence level (high | medium | low) required to report inactive exports or declarations
// duplicateSimilarity: Minimum similarity percentage threshold (0-100) used for duplicate block identification
// maxFileSize: Skip processing files exceeding this memory size limit in bytes (10485760 = 10MB)
// protectedPaths: Sensitive core files that are locked and must never be processed or modified under any circumstances
// protectedPatterns: Exclude files matching these regex expression filters from structural deletion operations
// autoApproveSafe: Toggle true to automatically stage and approve SAFE (🟢) recommendations without user interactive prompts
// requireDryRun: Enforces a sandboxed dry-run validation pass before applying changes to live src modules
